{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/ai-collaborations/continuation/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "continuation"
tags:
  * ai-collaborations
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. continuation

_Файлов:_ 10

h2. Содержание

* [[01-shared-memory-between-agents|01-shared-memory-between-agents.md]] — > [!WARNING]
* [[02-agentops-trace-envelope|02-agentops-trace-envelope.md]] — 
* [[03-a2a-vs-mcp-protocols|03-a2a-vs-mcp-protocols.md]] — > [!WARNING]
* [[04-memory-firewall-vs-prompt-worms|04-memory-firewall-vs-prompt-worms.md]] — > [!WARNING]
* [[05-roadmap-6-12-months|05-roadmap-6-12-months.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[06-metrics-tree|06-metrics-tree.md]] — 
* [[07-vs-notion-mem-affine-langgraph|07-vs-notion-mem-affine-langgraph.md]] — > [!WARNING]
* [[08-commercialization-three-paths|08-commercialization-three-paths.md]] — 
* [[09-do-not-glue|09-do-not-glue.md]] — 
* [[10-architecture-rfc|10-architecture-rfc.md]] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[README]] (сходство 0.19)
* [[README]] (сходство 0.15)
* [[README]] (сходство 0.15)
